nasb.text: Now Abraham was old, advanced in age; and the Lord had blessed Abraham in every way.

esv.text: Now Abraham was old, well advanced in years. And the Lord  had blessed Abraham in all things.

cnv.text: 亞伯拉罕老邁了，年事已高，耶和華在一切事上都賜福給他。

ccb.text: 亚伯拉罕已经年迈，耶和华在一切的事上都赐福给他。

csbs.text: 亚伯拉罕老了，上了年纪。耶和华在一切事上都祝福亚伯拉罕。
